title: Primary Runoff early voting begins Monday, May 18
description: Early voting for the May 26 Primary Runoff begins Monday, May 18, and runs through Friday, May 22.

title: Drone Strike Halts Fuel Output at Gazprom Plant in Russia
description: On Thursday, a Gazprom gas processing plant in Russia’s Astrakhan region halted fuel production after a drone attack sparked a fire. Key processing units were damaged, with repairs expected to take weeks or months. The strike is part of a broader pattern of attacks on Russia’s energy infrastructure amid the war in Ukraine.

title: Rory McIlroy has a bad finish for a rough start at the PGA Championship
description: By DOUG FERGUSON NEWTOWN SQUARE, Pa. (AP) — The blister on Rory McIlroy’s right pinky toe was the least of his worries Thursday in the PGA Championship. And it certainly didn’t cause him as much pain as staring a scorecard that featured five bogeys over his last six holes. He struggled mightily off the tee, [...]
